title: senites pringlei
intro: Senites pringlei, also known as the Pringle's senecio or woolly senecio, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to North America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, specifically its use as an antispasmodic and expectorant, helping to relieve coughs and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Senites pringlei include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote digestive health, making it useful for treating conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be monitored due to potential toxicity.
